title: ExtraTotems
description: This mod adds 10 extra totems that give you special effects and effect people around you
body:
Extra Totems is a Fabric mod that expands survival and combat mechanics in Minecraft by adding 10 powerful custom totems.
Each totem activates automatically upon lethal damage, saving the player and triggering unique self effects while also affecting nearby entities within a 10-block radius.

Balanced, impactful, and vanilla-friendly.

✨ Totems & Abilities
⚡ Totem of Speed

Self effects:

Speed III (30s)

Jump Boost II (20s)

Nearby entities:

Slowness III (10s)

Knocked back away from the player

💪 Totem of Strength

Self effects:

Strength II (30s)

Resistance I (20s)

Nearby entities:

Instantly dealt 10 magic damage

🔥 Totem of Fire

Self effects:

Fire Resistance (60s)

Nearby entities:

Set on fire for 10 seconds

🌀 Totem of Teleportation

Self effects:

Slow Falling (20s)

Randomly teleported up to 100 blocks away

Nearby entities:

Randomly teleported up to 50 blocks away (ender-pearl style scatter)

💎 Totem of Immortality

Self effects:

Health fully restored

Regeneration IV (45s)

Absorption IV (5s)

Resistance II (40s)

Nearby entities:

Struck by lightning

❄️ Totem of Ice

Self effects:

Resistance II (30s)

Nearby entities:

Slowness V (20s)

Frozen for 20 seconds (400 frozen ticks)

🌬️ Totem of Wind

Self effects:

Slow Falling (30s)

Speed II (30s)

Nearby entities:

Launched into the air (+1.5 upward velocity)

☠️ Totem of Poison

Self effects:

Regeneration II (30s)

Nearby entities:

Poison III (10s)

🪨 Totem of Earth

Self effects:

Absorption III (30s)

Resistance III (30s)

Nearby entities:

Weakness II (20s)

Slowness III (20s)

🌊 Totem of Water

Self effects:

Water Breathing (60s)

Conduit Power (60s)

Dolphin’s Grace (60s)

Extinguishes fire on the player

Nearby entities:

Fire extinguished

Instantly dealt 20 drowning damage

🔧 Features

✔ 10 unique custom totems

✔ Area-of-effect interactions

✔ Vanilla-friendly balance

✔ Lightweight & performance-safe

✔ Fabric support

⚙️ Compatibility

Loader: Fabric

Environment: Client & Server

Minecraft Version: (e.g. 1.21.1)

📜 License

MIT License

👤 Author

ameer12345nmo

🛠️ Crafting Recipes

All custom totems are crafted using the vanilla Totem of Undying as a base, combined with themed materials that reflect each totem’s power. Crafting is intended to be late-game to maintain balance in Minecraft survival.

⚡ Totem of Speed

Crafted by combining a Totem of Undying with speed-focused materials such as sugar or movement-related items.
Designed for players who prefer fast escapes and mobility.

💪 Totem of Strength

Created using a Totem of Undying and combat-enhancing materials associated with power and endurance.
Ideal for aggressive playstyles and boss fights.

🔥 Totem of Fire

Crafted with a Totem of Undying and fire-related materials.
Perfect for surviving lava, fire, and Nether environments.

🌀 Totem of Teleportation

Requires a Totem of Undying combined with teleportation-themed items.
Allows unpredictable but effective survival through random relocation.

💎 Totem of Immortality

The most expensive to craft, requiring a Totem of Undying and rare end-game materials.
Designed as the ultimate survival totem.

❄️ Totem of Ice

Crafted using a Totem of Undying and cold or freezing-related materials.
Specializes in crowd control and defensive survival.

🌬️ Totem of Wind

Made from a Totem of Undying combined with air or movement-based components.
Focuses on vertical mobility and knockback control.

☠️ Totem of Poison

Crafted with a Totem of Undying and toxic or potion-related materials.
Balances self-survival with enemy debilitation.

🪨 Totem of Earth

Requires a Totem of Undying and durability-focused materials.
Built for tank-style gameplay and damage resistance.

🌊 Totem of Water

Crafted using a Totem of Undying and ocean-related materials.
Optimized for underwater survival and aquatic combat.

⚖️ Balance Notes

All recipes require a Totem of Undying

Higher-tier totems use rarer materials

Designed for late-game progression

No totem completely replaces the vanilla Totem—each offers a situational advantage
